$comment: Suppression config for tree-sitter-grammar-utils lint. Not yet read by the tool — tracked as a feature request. This file documents intentional findings that should not be reported.

suppress_degenerate_reasons.contents: Bare overlap_point is valid CA transcription — marks overlap begin with no speech in that turn
suppress_degenerate_reasons.free_text: Bare continuation is structurally valid; no real-data occurrences
suppress_degenerate_reasons.header_gap: A header gap IS just whitespace — this is its correct definition
suppress_degenerate_reasons.text_with_bullets: Bare continuation is structurally valid; no real-data occurrences
suppress_degenerate_reasons.text_with_bullets_and_pics: Bare continuation is structurally valid; no real-data occurrences

suppress_token_shadow_reasons.generic_id_ses: Strict+catch-all pattern: specific SES values (White, WC, etc.) have prec 1, generic_id_ses is the fallback for unrecognized values. Intentional by design.
suppress_token_shadow_reasons.unsupported_dependent_tier: Strict+catch-all pattern: %x-prefixed tiers are specific, unsupported_dependent_tier is the fallback. Intentional by design.
